request_text: Add a category filter to the standard report
rationale: Clause 4.2.1 includes date AND category filters on reports.

request_text: Export a generated report to Excel format
rationale: Clause 4.2.2 includes PDF and Excel (xlsx) export.

request_text: Enable password reset for users
rationale: Clause 3.1 includes password reset functionality.

request_text: Add a new widget component to the management dashboard
rationale: Clause 4.3 includes standard chart and widget components.

request_text: Support login with a local username and password
rationale: Clause 3.1 includes local username/password authentication.

request_text: Integrate with one external accounting system
rationale: Clause 5.1 includes integration with at most 2 external systems; one is within the limit.

request_text: Users should be able to reset their forgotten passwords themselves
rationale: Clause 3.1 includes password reset functionality.

request_text: Place a bar chart component on the admin dashboard
rationale: Clause 4.3 includes standard chart and widget components.

request_text: Let managers download the sales report as a PDF file
rationale: Clause 4.2.2 includes PDF export of generated reports.

request_text: Allow reports to be filtered by a date range
rationale: Clause 4.2.1 includes date filters on reports.

request_text: Generate three standard reports each month
rationale: Clause 4.2.1 includes up to 5 standard reports per month; three is within the limit.

request_text: Add SAML single sign-on
rationale: Clause 7.1 excludes SSO and SAML integration.

request_text: Build a native mobile app for iOS
rationale: Clause 7.1 excludes mobile application development.

request_text: Add real-time data streaming to the dashboard
rationale: Clause 7.1 excludes real-time data streaming.

request_text: Integrate with Okta as the identity provider
rationale: Clause 7.1 excludes third-party identity provider (IdP) integration.

request_text: Send push notifications to users
rationale: Clause 7.1 excludes push notifications.

request_text: Let users sign in through their corporate single sign-on
rationale: Clause 7.1 excludes SSO integration.

request_text: Deliver an Android application for the product
rationale: Clause 7.1 excludes mobile application development.

request_text: Stream live updates to clients the moment data changes
rationale: Clause 7.1 excludes real-time data streaming and push.

request_text: Let users log in with their Google account
rationale: Sounds like in-scope login (Clause 3.1) but a Google account is third-party OAuth/IdP, excluded by Clause 7.1.

request_text: Send a push notification whenever a new report is generated
rationale: Sounds like reporting (Clause 4.2) but the deliverable is push notifications, excluded by Clause 7.1.

request_text: Add a login option through Microsoft Entra ID
rationale: Sounds like in-scope login (Clause 3.1) but Entra ID is a third-party IdP, excluded by Clause 7.1.

request_text: Show live-streaming sales metrics on the dashboard
rationale: Sounds like the in-scope dashboard (Clause 4.3) but live streaming is excluded by Clause 7.1.

request_text: Add an audit log that records every user action
rationale: No clause covers audit logging; a new capability not excluded is a change request.

request_text: Implement a bulk CSV import of customer records
rationale: The contract scopes report export (Clause 4.2.2), not data import; a new capability is a change request.

request_text: Add two-factor authentication for user logins
rationale: Clause 3.1 scopes local username/password only; 2FA is a new, non-excluded capability.

request_text: Add email marketing campaign management
rationale: No clause covers marketing campaigns; a new capability is a change request.

request_text: Provide a public REST API for third-party developers
rationale: No clause scopes a public developer API; a new capability is a change request.

request_text: Add a dark mode theme to the user interface
rationale: No clause covers theming; a new capability is a change request.

request_text: Support 10 concurrent sessions per user
rationale: Clause 3.1 caps concurrent sessions at 3; 10 exceeds the limit.

request_text: Increase monthly report generation to 20 reports
rationale: Clause 4.2.1 caps standard reports at 5 per month; 20 exceeds the limit.

request_text: Integrate with 5 external systems
rationale: Clause 5.1 caps external integrations at 2; 5 exceeds the limit.

request_text: Raise the concurrent session limit from 3 to 8
rationale: Clause 3.1 caps concurrent sessions at 3; the request targets 8, exceeding the limit.

request_text: Deliver a full custom reporting suite estimated at about 35 hours of work
rationale: Clause 4.2.1 reporting effort pool is 40h with ~20h already consumed; a 35h ask exceeds the remaining pool.

request_text: Extend the external system integration with about 18 more hours of connector work
rationale: Clause 5.1 integration effort pool is 24h with ~14h already consumed; an 18h ask exceeds the remaining pool.

request_text: Make the reporting module better
rationale: A vague wish with no concrete deliverable; escalate to the PMO.

request_text: Improve the overall dashboard experience
rationale: A vague wish with no concrete deliverable; escalate to the PMO.

request_text: The system should be made more user-friendly
rationale: A vague wish with no concrete deliverable; escalate to the PMO.

request_text: Fix the crash that happens when exporting an empty report
rationale: A bug fix; Clause 8.1 covers bug-fix maintenance for 12 months.

request_text: The password reset email is not being sent — please fix it
rationale: A bug fix on in-scope functionality; Clause 8.1 covers maintenance.

request_text: Resolve the error that occurs when adding a date filter
rationale: A bug fix on in-scope functionality; Clause 8.1 covers maintenance.

request_text: Fix the dashboard widget that fails to load
rationale: A bug fix on in-scope functionality; Clause 8.1 covers maintenance.

request_text: Rapora tarih filtresi ekleyin
rationale: Clause 4.2.1 includes date filters on reports (TR: add a date filter to the report).

request_text: SAML tek oturum açma (SSO) ekleyin
rationale: Clause 7.1 excludes SSO/SAML (TR: add SAML single sign-on).

request_text: iOS için mobil uygulama geliştirin
rationale: Clause 7.1 excludes mobile app development (TR: develop a mobile app for iOS).

request_text: Eşzamanlı oturum sınırını 3'ten 12'ye çıkarın
rationale: Clause 3.1 caps concurrent sessions at 3; the request targets 12 (TR: raise the concurrent session limit from 3 to 12).

request_text: Kullanıcı işlemlerini kaydeden bir denetim günlüğü ekleyin
rationale: No clause covers audit logging; a new capability (TR: add an audit log recording user actions).

request_text: Rapor dışa aktarımındaki hatayı düzeltin
rationale: A bug fix; Clause 8.1 covers maintenance (TR: fix the bug in report export).
